name: Alice Walker

acts.description: Publicly endorsed David Icke's antisemitic conspiracy book in a 2018 New York Times interview

behavior_summary: In a 2018 New York Times interview, Alice Walker recommended David Icke's antisemitic conspiracy text. She has not fully recanted.

notable_works: In Search of Our Mothers' Gardens
art.summary: Pulitzer-winning novelist and civil rights essayist. The Color Purple is one of the most important American novels of the 20th century.

verdict.blurb: Wrote The Color Purple. Later told the New York Times that a virulently antisemitic conspiracy theorist had helped her understand the world. The art doesn't know what the author believes.
